case_title: TOLENTINO, ROLAND Q. VS BRYANT, KIMBERLY A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,080.00 FILED BY TOLENTINO, ROLAND Q. AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, KIMBERLY A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-16-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF MAY-19-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, KIMBERLY A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOLENTINO, ROLAND Q. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYANT, KIMBERLY A. $3,080.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,135.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO KIMBERLY A. BRYANT RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
